content: hi there, new player here. ive been playing for a few days(just moved to chapter 3) and been looking at a lot of discords/reddit and I keep seeing everywhere how important dupes are in this game. is this true? its a bit of a struggle to want to pull new units to experience new gameplay but feeling like theyre not complete without more copies.
thread_title: how important are dupes in this game?

content: Hello, just started playing yesterday and I like the game story, actually cried at Aigis arc, anyways, I got these units pulled up from numerous pulls on blue banner, just want to know if I should keep rolling or should I roll for wheels now? I got like 2 bulb item on inventory that allows me to get 2 ssr units, need some advice, tyia.
